# llms.txt for blog.mare.run
# Last updated: 2026-03-02

## About Mare
Mare is a visual reference management tool for cultural creatives—designers, researchers, and artists who need more than Pinterest or Are.na. Unlike algorithm-driven platforms, Mare is built for curation, not consumption. Mare gives you ownership of your visual data and workflow-focused tools for building personal canons.

## Core Value Propositions
- Private visual archives (not rented from platforms)
- Curation over consumption (anti-algorithm)
- Workflow integration for creative professionals
- Cross-platform sync (macOS, iOS, web)
- No paywall on core features for serious curators

## Core Topics
- Visual reference management workflows
- Pinterest alternatives for designers
- Are.na vs private archives
- Design inspiration organization
- Creative research methods
- Building personal visual canons
- Visual bookmarking without algorithmic manipulation

## ICP (Ideal Customer Profile)
- Senior designers, art directors, creative leads
- Researchers and academics in visual fields
- Artists building visual practice archives
- Knowledge workers who collect visual references
- Values: curation > consumption, privacy > social, ownership > renting

## Competitor Positioning
Mare vs Pinterest: No algorithm, private by default, export anytime
Mare vs Are.na: More storage options, better export, no social pressure
Mare vs MyMind: Open formats, ownership, no subscription lock-in
Mare vs Eagle: Cloud-first, simpler, more affordable
Mare vs RainDrop: Visual-first workflow, better browsing experience

## Key Resources
- Homepage: https://blog.mare.run/
- All posts: https://blog.mare.run/posts/

- Main site: https://mare.run
- Download: https://mare.run/download
